panels.heading: What is CivicTheme?
panels.content: CivicTheme is an open source design system for local government websites.

panels.heading: Who maintains this component library?
panels.content: ct-design-infra ports CivicTheme into framework-agnostic, token-driven Web Components.

panels.heading: Can a panel be disabled?
panels.content: Yes, individual panels can be disabled and won't respond to interaction.
